source.name: The UAE Government Portal — Student visa

extraSources.name: ICP — Federal Authority for Identity, Citizenship, Customs & Port Security

requirements.label: Admission / sponsorship by the university
requirements.detail: An offer from a UAE university, which usually sponsors your student residence visa.

requirements.label: Proof of funds
requirements.detail: No single fixed figure — show evidence (often several months of bank statements) that you can cover tuition and living costs.

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Health insurance valid in the UAE (often arranged with the visa).

requirements.label: Medical fitness test
requirements.detail: A medical fitness test is required as part of the residence visa process.

requirements.label: Emirates ID registration
requirements.detail: Register for an Emirates ID after arrival as part of residency.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for at least 6 months.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer tuition with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a UAE number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange housing early in Dubai, Abu Dhabi or Sharjah.
